# Generate_Multiple_Serializers

```csharp
// <auto-generated/>

#nullable enable
#pragma warning disable

using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using HotChocolate;
using HotChocolate.Types;
using HotChocolate.Execution.Configuration;
using HotChocolate.Types.Relay;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace HotChocolate.Execution.Generated
{
    internal static class NodeIdValueSerializers
    {
        private sealed class ProductIdNodeIdValueSerializer : CompositeNodeIdValueSerializer<global::TestNamespace.ProductId>
        {
            protected override NodeIdFormatterResult Format(Span<byte> buffer, global::TestNamespace.ProductId value, out int written)
            {
                if (TryFormatIdPart(buffer, value.Sku, out var skuWritten)
                    && TryFormatIdPart(buffer[(skuWritten)..], value.BrandId, out var brandIdWritten))
                {
                    written = skuWritten + brandIdWritten;
                    return NodeIdFormatterResult.Success;
                }

                written = 0;
                return NodeIdFormatterResult.BufferTooSmall;
            }

            protected override bool TryParse(ReadOnlySpan<byte> buffer, out global::TestNamespace.ProductId value)
            {
                if (TryParseIdPart(buffer, out string sku, out var skuConsumed)
                    && TryParseIdPart(buffer[(skuConsumed)..], out int brandId, out var _))
                {
                    value = new global::TestNamespace.ProductId(sku, brandId);
                    return true;
                }

                value = default;
                return false;
            }
        }

        [InterceptsLocation("", 14, 14)]
        public static global::HotChocolate.Execution.Configuration.IRequestExecutorBuilder AddNodeIdValueSerializerFromGen0<T>(
            this global::HotChocolate.Execution.Configuration.IRequestExecutorBuilder builder)
            => builder.AddNodeIdValueSerializer<ProductIdNodeIdValueSerializer>();

        private sealed class BrandIdNodeIdValueSerializer : CompositeNodeIdValueSerializer<global::TestNamespace.BrandId>
        {
            protected override NodeIdFormatterResult Format(Span<byte> buffer, global::TestNamespace.BrandId value, out int written)
            {
                if (TryFormatIdPart(buffer, value.Value, out var p_valueWritten))
                {
                    written = p_valueWritten;
                    return NodeIdFormatterResult.Success;
                }

                written = 0;
                return NodeIdFormatterResult.BufferTooSmall;
            }

            protected override bool TryParse(ReadOnlySpan<byte> buffer, out global::TestNamespace.BrandId value)
            {
                if (TryParseIdPart(buffer, out int p_value, out var _))
                {
                    value = new global::TestNamespace.BrandId(p_value);
                    return true;
                }

                value = default;
                return false;
            }
        }

        [InterceptsLocation("", 13, 14)]
        public static global::HotChocolate.Execution.Configuration.IRequestExecutorBuilder AddNodeIdValueSerializerFromGen1<T>(
            this global::HotChocolate.Execution.Configuration.IRequestExecutorBuilder builder)
            => builder.AddNodeIdValueSerializer<BrandIdNodeIdValueSerializer>();

    }
}
```
